creator: bsam@FreeBSD.org
text:
Current version at the ports tree (0.27) is not fetchable from
	(at list some) CPAN sites. A new version 0.30 is available.

Fix: Update to new version 0.30.



WBR
-- 
bsam--pGMpl5dXn2bjFjXYst4JmDPQLmInQGEbbAMPVGoXvw8iOC1Y
